nodes.name: Dubusia
nodes.summary: Dubusia（Dubusia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如Carriker's mountain tanager、Chestnut-bellied mountain tanager。

nodes.name: Chestnut-bellied mountain tanager
nodes.summary: Chestnut-bellied mountain tanager（Dubusia castaneoventris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Chestnut-bellied mountain tanager。

nodes.name: Chestnut-bellied mountain tanager
nodes.summary: The chestnut-bellied mountain tanager (Dubusia castaneoventris) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Bolivia and Peru. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
